claim_bullets.bullet_text: Sometimes we'll want to flip a function, but retain the flexibility to call it in its curried form (pass one parameter) or non-curried form (pass both). (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.196-196)
Now if we write mapWith = flip(map) , we can call mapWith(fn, list) or mapWith(fn)(list) , our choice. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.196-196)

source_record_text: Chapter on self-currying flip function in JavaScriptAllongé, covering flip function and argument order reversal.
